# TiledStyleBinding.Style property

The pre-read [`TiledStyleDefinition`](../TiledStyleDefinition.md), or `null` if the SNO id couldn't be read (typically because it's a sentinel value like `1`, `3`, `20` — observed as "enum-shaped" small-id bindings whose semantics are not the same as a real SNO reference).

```csharp
public TiledStyleDefinition? Style { get; set; }
```
